findings.issue: Mixed Latin A/B + Katakana ウ/エ inside same zh question. Critical: katakana leaked into Chinese output (zh choices 2 and 3 begin with raw ウ./エ.).
findings.recommended_fix: Replace ウ/エ with C/D in zh choices to match A/B prefix already established.

findings.issue: All four zh choices carry raw Katakana ア/イ/ウ/エ prefix — Japanese-script artifacts in Chinese output. Severe normalization break.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace ア/イ/ウ/エ with A/B/C/D in all zh choices.

findings.issue: All four zh choices carry raw Katakana ア/イ/ウ/エ prefix. Same severity as Q2.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace ア/イ/ウ/エ with A/B/C/D in all zh choices.

notes: Katakana leakage into zh (not just CJK-ordinal substitution) is more severe than p043/p086. Stems and bodies remain faithful (e.g., グループウェア→群组软件, ハウジング→主机托管服务 are correct).
